name: wire-transport-field-reject
description: An export entry carrying a transport field (`bundleUrl`). Transport metadata — `bundleUrl`, `bundleHost`, `bundleSri`, `styleUrl`, `connect`, `requires`, `typesUrl`, `typesSri` — lives once on the registered `GadgetDescriptor`, never on the wire. `gadgetExportUseSchema` is `.strict()`, so a transport field MUST be rejected at parse time.
rejectReason: transport metadata is descriptor-side (App.gadgets), not a wire field; gadgetExportUseSchema is .strict().
